name: WazirX Crypto Exchange API
what_it_does: Indian cryptocurrency exchange with REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders and developers to access INR and USDT spot trading pairs, market data, and account management, with Binance-style HMAC-SHA256 authentication, after recovering from a major 2024 security breach that required platform reconstruction.
use_cases: Accessing INR spot market data via WazirX API for Indian crypto price tracking
Executing spot trades via WazirX API for INR-denominated cryptocurrency trading
Streaming real-time data via WazirX WebSocket for live market data applications
Fetching account data via WazirX API for Indian portfolio management
Integrating WazirX data via API for Indian cryptocurrency analysis platforms
not_for: High-value institutional trading (post-2024 breach — trust concerns remain)
Non-Indian users (WazirX is India-focused with INR pairs)
Futures or derivatives trading (WazirX is spot-only)
best_when: An Indian developer needs access to a widely-used Indian crypto exchange with strong brand recognition and INR liquidity, accepting the post-breach risk.
avoid_when: You need institutional-grade security assurances, futures trading, or are outside India. Carefully evaluate the 2024 $234M hack implications before production use.

auth.notes: HMAC-SHA256 signature. Parameters: api_key, signature, recvWindow, timestamp. Binance-compatible authentication pattern. Signature: HMAC-SHA256 of total params string using secret key. Timestamp: Unix milliseconds. recvWindow: default 5000ms. REST API at api.wazirx.com/sapi/v1/. WebSocket: wss://stream.wazirx.com/stream. Former Binance acquisition (2019-2023): Binance divested WazirX. P2P platform. Indian exchange.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; trading fees: 0.2% standard
pricing.paid_tiers: WRX token for fee discounts; volume-based fee tiers
pricing.notes: Indian company (Mumbai). Founded 2017 by Nischal Shetty, Sameer Mhatre, Siddharth Menon. Acquired by Binance 2019 for undisclosed sum — then Binance divested in 2023 amid regulatory concerns. CRITICAL: July 2024 — $234M hack (North Korean Lazarus Group suspected). WazirX subsequently halted withdrawals and filed for moratorium with Singapore courts. Platform reconstruction ongoing. WRX token: native token for fee discounts. INR trading: UPI, bank transfer. P2P: peer-to-peer trading feature. India's second-largest exchange (pre-hack). Post-hack: uncertain platform future.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: CRITICAL: $234M hack July 2024 (Lazarus Group). Moratorium filed. Withdrawals halted post-hack. Platform reconstruction ongoing. Binance-compatible API. INR-focused. India-only. Post-Binance divestiture.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: GET requests idempotent. Order placement: use Binance-compatible newClientOrderId. POST-HACK: platform stability uncertain — idempotency less relevant if platform is unstable.
known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL RISK: $234M hack (July 2024) — North Korean Lazarus Group. Platform in recovery/moratorium as of knowledge cutoff
Withdrawal restrictions: post-hack withdrawal capabilities were suspended — verify current status
Binance-compatible API: same HMAC-SHA256 pattern — existing Binance code may work with minimal changes
Post-Binance divestiture (2023): regulatory uncertainty increased; Binance-WazirX relationship dissolved
India-only exchange: non-Indian residents face KYC barriers (PAN/Aadhaar required)
STRONGLY RECOMMEND: evaluate CoinDCX as primary Indian exchange alternative given WazirX's 2024 breach

security_score_components.security_notes: CRITICAL: $234M hack (July 2024) — one of the largest exchange hacks in history. Multi-sig wallet compromise by Lazarus Group. TLS enforced (at API layer). Binance-compatible HMAC-SHA256. Post-hack: security posture under reconstruction. Moratorium filed with Singapore courts. Indian regulation: FEMA/PMLA. Platform trust severely damaged by breach. STRONGLY recommend alternative Indian exchanges (CoinDCX) for new integrations until post-hack recovery is complete and audited.
